hidden_state.wab_instruction: Triage your inbox: approve the invoice, ignore the promo, report the security alert, approve the travel request, and respond to the onboarding email without using Reply All. Forward the escalation email to your manager.

task_completion_criteria.confirmation_phrase: I have completed the onboarding checklist.
